purpose: Define the minimum source-project closure needed to migrate reliable rule-based horizontal seed generation into the standalone core without bringing ROS, motion state machine or product dependencies.
migration_principles: Migrate deterministic seed math and CuRobo IK/trajopt repair adapters only.
Keep all migrated logic behind SeedProvider or RepairAdapter-style core interfaces.
Do not migrate ROS node lifecycle, service callbacks, launch files, motion execution, external_comm, state machine code or real robot driver behavior.
Every migrated rule seed must become a CandidateRecord with source_lineage and validation metrics.
Rule seed remains the reliable fallback and the main offline data generation baseline.

source_inventory.migration_action: Reuse existing standalone construction; move shared goal construction helper only if RepairAdapter needs it.

source_inventory.current_standalone_match: level_planner_core/planner.py:_resample_trajectory_linear handles [T, DOF] resampling for selection only.
source_inventory.migration_action: Implement core helper that converts SeedCandidate trajectory [T, DOF] to CuRobo seed_traj [batch, n, action_horizon, dof], using planner.trajopt_solver.action_horizon.

source_inventory.current_standalone_match: No equivalent; current core calls MotionPlanner.plan_pose only.
source_inventory.migration_action: Wrap planner.trajopt_solver.solve_pose(goal, current_state, seed_traj=prepared_seed, use_implicit_goal=True, return_seeds=1, finetune_attempts=1). Preserve candidate id and source_lineage.
Move to standalone rule seed provider config with request/runtime overrides for k_generate and k_accept.
Implement RuleLevelSeedProvider.generate() that loops family configs, calls the migrated alignment seed generator, emits SeedCandidate records for raw rule seeds and provider metadata.
Do not copy as one monolithic method. Split into RuleLevelSeedProvider for generation and RepairAdapter for CuRobo optimization so diffusion/rule share the same repair path.
Migrate as a standalone rule seed module using planner.compute_kinematics and CuRobo IK. Reuse existing quaternion/twist helpers from level_planner_core.constraints where possible.
Migrate into rule seed module with explicit SR5 joint limit config; remove logger-only side effects and return structured diagnostics.
Defer until basic rule families and pose repair pass. Add as optional post-repair enhancement for candidates with large branch jump.
Migrate as optional rule seed variant transforms after the baseline families are available. They should produce new CandidateRecord rows, not mutate the original seed silently.
Keep as a later experiment. It is useful for diagnostics but not required for the first closed-loop seed provider.
Do not migrate directly. Reimplement in standalone PlannerRunRecord, CandidateRecord, fallback_trace and selector flow.

explicitly_excluded_dependencies.reason: ROS adapter must remain a thin entry layer and cannot own core planner control flow.

explicitly_excluded_dependencies.dependency: motion execution and robot driver calls
explicitly_excluded_dependencies.reason: This standalone project is plan-only for the current milestone.

explicitly_excluded_dependencies.dependency: external_comm and product workflow state machine
explicitly_excluded_dependencies.reason: They are outside the closed-loop planning core and would make the repository heavy again.
Headless validation is the default environment.

explicitly_excluded_dependencies.dependency: legacy environment-variable experiment switches as primary API
explicitly_excluded_dependencies.reason: Standalone behavior must be controlled by request seed_policy and config, while env vars may remain debug overrides only.

level_planner_core/rule_seed.py.responsibility: Generate raw rule SeedCandidate objects for SR5 horizontal alignment families.

level_planner_core/repair.py.responsibility: Run CuRobo repair for external rule/diffusion seeds and planner-native candidates through a shared adapter.

level_planner_core/validators.py.responsibility: Produce hard_validation_metric_contract fields for every candidate.

migration_sequence.action: Add RuleLevelSeedProvider with static family configs and pure math/twist helper reuse.
Add FK/IK helper closure from the initialized planner without ROS dependencies.
Emit raw rule SeedCandidate rows with precheck, lineage and diagnostics.
Admit rule and diffusion seeds into the same repair pool and then into the unified validator.
Use rule provider as learned-first fallback and data generation baseline.

first_required_curobo_calls: IK solver solve_pose or equivalent available from planner internals

risk_items.risk: CuRobo internal IK/trajopt solver APIs are less stable than MotionPlanner.plan_pose.
risk_items.mitigation: Keep all direct internal calls in repair/rule_seed adapters and cover with smoke tests.

risk_items.risk: Branch jump handling can produce valid alignment but poor continuity.
risk_items.mitigation: Run unified hard validator and keep split/smooth/bridge variants as separate candidates for critic learning.

risk_items.risk: Collision replay may remain optional until validator adapter is complete.
risk_items.mitigation: Record collision_unchecked explicitly and keep it out of positive labels when strict collision validation is required.
